Warmlist

Shipped Product Live

The Problem: Tracking high-intent network leads usually falls back to messy spreadsheets.

The Solution: A smart CRM that uses AI to score and remind you about warm interactions.

Live GitHub

Screenshots

Project Overview

  • Created a zero-friction CRM for relationship management.
  • Replaced manual triage with LLM-based lead prioritization.

Key Takeaways

  • Replaces messy spreadsheets with an AI-prioritized relationship queue
  • Automated lead temperature scoring and relationship follow-ups
  • Evaluation-driven design with 20 lead transcript segments for initial testing

My Role

Product Manager

  • Defined lead scoring rubrics to quantify 'relationship temperature'
  • Designed user flow for priority-first relationship management
  • Created evaluation path for lead prioritization quality
  • Iterated on CRM dashboard layout to minimize user friction

Problem

Founders lose track of 'warm' conversations across LinkedIn, email, and Twitter.

Why This Matters

Founders and PMs lose thousands in deal value by failing to follow up with 'warm' leads. Prioritizing these contacts is critical for growth and network retention.

Users

Founders and PMs managing high-intent leads and fundraising contacts.

Solution

A smart CRM that ingests communication history, uses AI to score relationship temperature, and sets follow-ups.

System Architecture

Email/LinkedIn Data
LLM Scoring
Priority Queue
Dashboard

Results

Warmlist is currently in evaluation. The product works in the UI, but the latest automated evaluation path did not complete real summary generation, so final performance metrics are not yet portfolio-ready.

Future Improvements

Direct integrations with Gmail and LinkedIn for automatic syncing.

Evaluation

Dataset Size

20 transcript segments

Evaluation Method

Automated evaluation run plus manual product verification.

Primary Metric

Lead prioritization quality and summary usefulness.

Status

Evaluation path under debugging. Final metrics will be added after rerunning the test through the working API path.

Tech Stack

Next.jsTailwindLLM APIs

© 2026 Ruthwik Arepelly · AI Product Manager

Built for shippability and measurable outcomes
